title: Executive – Public, International and Alumni Relations (PIAR) Department [NIE]
description:
ABOUT THE NATIONAL INSTITUTE OF EDUCATION (NIE)

The National Institute of Education (NIE), Singapore, is Singapore’s national teacher education institute and we are proud to be an integral part of the nation’s education service. We play a key role in the preparation of teachers and in the provision of teacher professional and school leadership development programmes.
We are committed to our vision of being An Institute of Distinction: Leading the Future of Education and our mission to Inspire Learning, Transform Teaching and Advance Research. Read more about NIE here.

NIE invites suitable candidates for the positions of Executive with the Public, International and Alumni Relations (PIAR) department.

Responsibilities

The Executives support NIE’s institutional communications and stakeholder engagement efforts across hospitality relations, media relations, and integrated marketing. The roles contributes to delivering meaningful guest experiences, strengthening NIE’s public visibility, and supporting branding and alumni initiatives through coordinated communications and operational support.

Hospitality Relations

  • Support the management of official visits to NIE, contributing to guest experience and institutional relationship-building.
  • Assist in the operations and visitor experience of the NIE Visitors Learning Centre.
  • Support the organization of graduation ceremonies including guest coordination, video production, and reception arrangements.
  • Assist in Institute and University-level events and engagements as required.

Media Relations

  • Assist in pitching story ideas to local and international media to raise NIE’s visibility and profile.
  • Support media engagement activities including responding to queries, issuing media releases, and coordinating interviews.
  • Track media coverage, compile reports and analyze performance metrics to inform communication strategies.

Integrated Marketing & Alumni Relations

  • Work with the social media team to ensure content is accurate, current and engaging across platforms.
  • Assist NIE departments with branding and marketing needs, including coordinating print, digital or motion production for institutional campaigns.
  • Support the preparation and submission of corporate reports to key internal and external stakeholders.
  • Assist the alumni team in implementing engagement strategies and supporting alumni programmes and activities.

Requirements

  • A polytechnic diploma in Business, Communications, Hospitality, Marketing or a related field.
  • Prior experience in hospitality management, marketing, media relations or event operations in an agency will be an advantage.
  • At least two years of working experience.
  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to interact professionally with diverse stakeholders.
  • Good organizational and project coordination skills, with attention to details.
  • Able to multi-task and work under tight timelines.
  • Interest in communications, hospitality, branding or alumni engagement.
  • Familiarity with digital tools, social media platforms and basic content development is essential.

Closing Date
The closing date of the advertisement is 9 February 2026.

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Other Information
NIE staff can take chartered buses at their own expense from or near their home to the NIE campus. This is subject to the availability of bus routes and seats.

postedCompany.description:
A research-intensive public university, Nanyang Technological University, Singapore (NTU Singapore) has 33,000 undergraduate and postgraduate students in the Engineering, Business, Science, Humanities, Arts, & Social Sciences, and Graduate colleges. It also has a medical school, the Lee Kong Chian School of Medicine, established jointly with Imperial College London.


NTU is also home to world-class autonomous institutes – the National Institute of Education, S Rajaratnam School of International Studies, Earth Observatory of Singapore, and Singapore Centre for Environmental Life Sciences Engineering – and various leading research centres such as the Nanyang Environment & Water Research Institute (NEWRI) and Energy Research Institute @ NTU (ERI@N).


Ranked amongst the world’s top universities by QS, NTU has also been named the world’s top young university for the past seven years. The University’s main campus is frequently listed among the Top 15 most beautiful university campuses in the world and has 57 Green Mark-certified (equivalent to LEED-certified) buildings, of which 95% are certified Green Mark Platinum. Apart from its main campus, NTU also has a campus in Novena, Singapore’s healthcare district.


Under the NTU Smart Campus vision, the University harnesses the power of digital technology and tech-enabled solutions to support better learning and living experiences, the discovery of new knowledge, and the sustainability of resources.


For more information, visit www.ntu.edu.sg
postedCompany.name: NANYANG TECHNOLOGICAL UNIVERSITY
